WORKSMART-AI

Specialist AI training and consultancy for higher education.

Build your institution’s AI capability with personalised, HE-focused support tailored to your goals and priorities.

Outcomes include:
– Your team being more productive
– Leaders more confident in AI decision-making
– Students work smarter with AI

View Our Services
Contact Us

“On average, people say AI has made them 33% more productive and saves them about 1.3 hours per day.”

- AI Collaboration Index 2025, Atlassian

Package of Support

HE specialists work with you to identify AI capability levels and design a tailored learning and development package to meet your institution’s needs.

Services include:
– Student AI work-ready workshops
– Staff foundational and advanced AI training packages
– Middle / senior leader 1:1 AI consultancy
– Academic AI coaching sessions
– Team away day / bespoke event AI sessions

View Our Services Contact Us

“AI literacy is now a fundamental skill akin to reading and writing.”

- HE Educators

Why choose WorkSmart-AI?

Our specialists have worked within HE and education for over 4 decades, supporting staff and students across the UK to develop digital skills and most recently AI capabilities.

Understanding how universities operate, the systems they use, and the people they support, is integral to robust and sustainable AI transformation.

Our 5-step process:

Free HE-specific capability assessment

To identify AI usage and design a package of support.

Agree a learning and development schedule

Underpinned by measurable objectives to ensure ROI.

Learning and development package of activities

Designed around your needs, timescales and budget.

Data-driven final review and roadmap session

To demonstrate progression and identify next steps.

On-going support

Online drop-in sessions and asynchronous extension courses help embed learning and support sustainability.

Book a Call
